# MetaPivot - 企业IM自动化办公服务 API接入说明 v1.0

> 企业内部多IM(钉钉/企微/飞书)渠道自动化办公服务，提供超级Agent自主执行、可视化工作流编排、MCP/Skill能力体系

Base: http://localhost:8000
Version: 1.0.0

## 部署规模（资源可伸缩）

所有基础设施已接口化，通过环境变量切换 backend：

| 环境变量 | 可选值 | 默认 | 说明 |
|---------|-------|------|------|
| DB_BACKEND | sqlite / postgresql | postgresql | 数据库（小企业用 sqlite 零依赖） |
| CACHE_BACKEND | memory / redis | redis | 缓存（小企业用 memory 零依赖） |
| VECTOR_BACKEND | local / milvus | local | 向量库（小企业用 local 零依赖） |

## 健康检查

### GET /health - 健康检查（无需认证）
200: `{status:string="healthy", version:string, env:string, profile:{db:string, cache:string, vector:string}}`

### GET /ready - 就绪检查（无需认证）
200/503: `{status:string, dependencies:{db:{backend:string, ok:boolean}, cache:{backend:string, ok:boolean}, vector:{backend:string, ok:boolean}, event_bus:{backend:string, ok:boolean}, memory:{backend:string, ok:boolean}, scheduler:{backend:string, ok:boolean}}}`

### GET /metrics - Prometheus 指标端点（无需认证）
200: `text/plain; version=0.0.4; charset=utf-8` — Prometheus 文本格式
指标分组：
- `metapivot_http_requests_total{method,path,status}` / `metapivot_http_request_duration_seconds{method,path}` — HTTP 请求计数/延迟（路径归一化：动态 ID → {id}）
- `metapivot_agent_tasks_total{status}` / `metapivot_agent_active_tasks` / `metapivot_agent_task_duration_seconds` / `metapivot_agent_token_usage_total{type}` — Agent 任务指标
- `metapivot_llm_calls_total{model,status}` / `metapivot_llm_call_duration_seconds{model}` — LLM 调用指标
- `metapivot_skill_calls_total{skill_name,status}` — Skill 调用指标
- `metapivot_workflow_executions_total{status}` — 工作流执行指标
注意：任务指标在任务到达终态（finished_at 非空）后才会出现，FAILED 任务也会采集。

## 认证
- JWT: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- 获取方式: `POST /api/v1/auth/token` Body: `{username*:string, password*:string}` 200: `{token:string, expires_in:integer}`
- API Key (IM回调): `X-API-Key: <key>` 用于Webhook端点
- IM签名校验: 钉钉/飞书/企微各自签名头校验

## 约定
- `*` 标记必填字段
- 所有字段string除非标注类型(integer/boolean/array/object)
- 统一错误: `{success:boolean=false, error:{code:string, message:string, request_id:string}}`
- 成功响应: `{success:boolean=true, data:object, request_id:string}`
- 分页: `?page=1&page_size=20` 响应: `{items:array, total:integer, page:integer, page_size:integer}`
- 异步任务: 立即返回`{task_id:string, status:"pending"}`，通过`GET /api/v1/agent/tasks/{task_id}`轮询或`GET /api/v1/agent/tasks/{task_id}/stream`订阅SSE
- 所有时间字段ISO8601格式

## 错误码
- AUTH_INVALID_CREDENTIALS: 认证失败
- AUTH_PERMISSION_DENIED: 权限不足
- AGENT_MAX_STEPS: Agent达到最大步数
- AGENT_HUMAN_REJECTED: 人工确认被拒绝
- SKILL_NOT_FOUND: Skill不存在
- SKILL_DISABLED: Skill已禁用
- WORKFLOW_INVALID: 工作流定义无效
- RATE_LIMITED: 频率限制（429，响应含 `retry_after` 字段 + `Retry-After` header，单位秒；限流维度：优先 user:{jwt_sub}，无 token 走 ip:{client_ip}）
- IM_CHANNEL_ERROR: IM渠道错误
- INTERNAL_ERROR: 内部错误

---

## 认证组

### POST /api/v1/auth/token - 获取JWT令牌
Body: `{username*:string, password*:string}`
200: `{token:string, token_type:string="Bearer", expires_in:integer=3600, user:object}`
401: AUTH_INVALID_CREDENTIALS

### POST /api/v1/auth/refresh - 刷新令牌 | JWT
Body: `{}`
200: `{token:string, expires_in:integer}`

---

## IM接入组（Webhook回调，无需JWT，需IM签名校验）

### POST /api/v1/im/dingtalk/webhook - 钉钉消息回调 | 签名校验
Headers: `timestamp*:string, sign*:string`
Body: `{conversationId:string, atUsers:array, text:object, msgId:string, senderId:string, senderNick:string, sessionWebhook:string, isAdmin:boolean=false}`
200: `{msgtype:string="text", text:object}` (钉钉要求返回文本结构)
注: 钉钉Stream模式由内部SDK建立WebSocket连接，无需此端点；此端点用于HTTP模式或卡片回调

### POST /api/v1/im/dingtalk/card/callback - 钉钉卡片回调 | 签名校验
Body: `{type:string="actionCallback", outTrackId:string, corpId:string, userId:string, content:string}`
200: `{status:string="SUCCESS"}`

### GET /api/v1/im/wecom/callback - 企微验证URL | 签名校验
Params: `msg_signature*:string, timestamp*:string, nonce*:string, echostr*:string`
200: `text/plain` (返回解密后的echostr)

### POST /api/v1/im/wecom/callback - 企微消息回调 | 签名校验
Headers: `msg_signature*:string, timestamp*:string, nonce*:string`
Body: `application/xml` (加密的XML)
200: `application/xml` (加密的XML响应)

### POST /api/v1/im/feishu/webhook - 飞书事件回调 | 签名校验
Headers: `X-Lark-Request-Timestamp*:string, X-Lark-Request-Nonce*:string, X-Lark-Signature*:string`
Body: `{challenge:string, header:object, event:object}`
200: `{challenge:string}` (URL验证) 或 `{code:integer=0}` (事件确认)

---

## Agent组

### POST /api/v1/agent/chat - Agent对话 | JWT
Body: `{message*:string, channel?:string="api", chat_id?:string, user_id?:string, context?:object, stream?:boolean=false}`
202: `{task_id:string, status:string="pending", stream_url:string}`
注: stream=true时返回SSE流，否则返回task_id异步处理

### GET /api/v1/agent/tasks - 任务列表 | JWT
Params: `?page=integer=1&page_size=integer=20&status=string`
200: `{items:array<{task_id:string, status:string, channel:string, user_id:string, result:object, created_at:string, updated_at:string}>, total:integer, page:integer, page_size:integer}`
注: admin可查所有任务，普通用户仅查自己的

### GET /api/v1/agent/tasks/{task_id} - 查询任务状态 | JWT
200: `{task_id:string, status:string, result:object, steps:array, created_at:string, updated_at:string, error:object}`
status枚举: pending/planning/executing/waiting_confirm/completed/failed

### GET /api/v1/agent/tasks/{task_id}/stream - 任务流式订阅 | JWT
Response: `text/event-stream` (SSE)
Events: `step_started`, `step_completed`, `tool_call`, `human_confirm_required`, `final_result`, `error`

### POST /api/v1/agent/tasks/{task_id}/confirm - 人工确认 | JWT
Body: `{decision*:string="approve"|"reject"|"modify", modifications?:object}`
200: `{task_id:string, status:string="executing"}`
注: decision=modify时modifications必填

### POST /api/v1/agent/tasks/{task_id}/cancel - 取消任务 | JWT
200: `{task_id:string, status:string="cancelled"}`

### POST /api/v1/agent/memory/search - 语义记忆检索 | JWT
Body: `{query*:string, chat_id?:string="", top_k?:integer=5}`
200: `[{role:string, content:string, score:number, type:string="message"|"fact"}]`
注: 跨会话语义记忆检索（memory_backend=semantic 时返回向量召回结果，其他 backend 返回空数组）；type=fact 为 consolidate_memories 抽取的长期事实记忆，type=message 为原始对话消息

### GET /api/v1/agent/tasks/{task_id}/replay - 会话重放 | JWT
200: `{task:object, events:array<{event_type:string, event_data:object, step_index:integer, created_at:string}>, langfuse_url:string}`
注: 返回 Agent 任务事件流（step_started/llm_call/tool_call/step_completed 等），用于会话重放与调试；langfuse_url 为 Langfuse trace 链接（未启用时为空）
403: AUTH_PERMISSION_DENIED（仅 admin 可查他人任务）
404: AGENT_TASK_NOT_FOUND

---

## 工作流组

### POST /api/v1/workflows - 创建工作流 | JWT(需admin)
Body: `{name*:string, description?:string, definition*:object, trigger?:object, enabled?:boolean=true}`
definition: `{nodes:array, edges:array, variables:array}`
200: `{id:string, name:string, status:string, created_at:string}`

### GET /api/v1/workflows - 工作流列表 | JWT
Params: `?page=integer=1&page_size=integer=20&enabled=boolean&keyword=string`
200: `{items:array, total:integer, page:integer, page_size:integer}`

### GET /api/v1/workflows/{workflow_id} - 工作流详情 | JWT
200: `{id:string, name:string, description:string, definition:object, trigger:object, enabled:boolean, version:integer, created_at:string, updated_at:string}`

### PUT /api/v1/workflows/{workflow_id} - 更新工作流 | JWT(需admin)
Body: `{name?:string, description?:string, definition?:object, trigger?:object, enabled?:boolean}`
200: `{id:string, updated_at:string}`

### DELETE /api/v1/workflows/{workflow_id} - 删除工作流 | JWT(需admin)
200: `{id:string, deleted:boolean=true}`

### POST /api/v1/workflows/{workflow_id}/execute - 执行工作流 | JWT
Body: `{inputs?:object, chat_id?:string, user_id?:string}`
202: `{execution_id:string, status:string="pending"}`

### GET /api/v1/workflows/executions/{execution_id} - 执行状态 | JWT
200: `{execution_id:string, workflow_id:string, status:string, current_node:string, inputs:object, outputs:object, started_at:string, finished_at:string, error:object}`
status枚举: pending/running/paused/completed/failed/cancelled

---

## Skill管理组

### POST /api/v1/skills - 创建Skill | JWT(需admin)
Body: `{name*:string, description*:string, input_schema*:object, source_type*:string="mcp"|"function"|"workflow", source_ref*:string, permission?:string, require_confirm?:boolean=false, tags?:array}`
200: `{id:string, name:string, enabled:boolean=true, created_at:string}`

### GET /api/v1/skills - Skill列表 | JWT
Params: `?page=integer&page_size=integer&enabled=boolean&source_type=string&keyword=string`
200: `{items:array, total:integer, page:integer, page_size:integer}`

### GET /api/v1/skills/{skill_id} - Skill详情 | JWT
200: `{id:string, name:string, description:string, input_schema:object, source_type:string, source_ref:string, permission:string, require_confirm:boolean, enabled:boolean, call_count:integer, created_at:string}`

### PUT /api/v1/skills/{skill_id} - 更新Skill | JWT(需admin)
Body: `{name?:string, description?:string, input_schema?:object, permission?:string, require_confirm?:boolean, tags?:array}`
200: `{id:string, updated_at:string}`

### DELETE /api/v1/skills/{skill_id} - 删除Skill | JWT(需admin)
200: `{id:string, deleted:boolean=true}`

### POST /api/v1/skills/{skill_id}/enable - 启用Skill | JWT(需admin)
200: `{id:string, enabled:boolean=true}`

### POST /api/v1/skills/{skill_id}/disable - 禁用Skill | JWT(需admin)
200: `{id:string, enabled:boolean=false}`

### POST /api/v1/skills/{skill_id}/test - 测试Skill | JWT
Body: `{input:object}`
200: `{success:boolean, result:object, duration_ms:integer, error:object}`

---

## 知识库组

### POST /api/v1/knowledge/documents - 上传文档 | JWT
Body: `multipart/form-data` (file + metadata)
200: `{id:string, filename:string, status:string="processing", chunk_count:integer}`

### GET /api/v1/knowledge/documents - 文档列表 | JWT
Params: `?page=integer&page_size=integer&status=string`
200: `{items:array, total:integer, page:integer, page_size:integer}`

### DELETE /api/v1/knowledge/documents/{document_id} - 删除文档 | JWT
200: `{id:string, deleted:boolean=true}`

### POST /api/v1/knowledge/search - 知识库检索 | JWT
Body: `{query*:string, top_k?:integer=5, score_threshold?:number=0.7, filter?:object}`
200: `{results:array<{document_id:string, content:string, score:number, metadata:object}>, total:integer}`

---

## 审计组

### GET /api/v1/audit/logs - 审计日志查询 | JWT(需admin)
Params: `?page=integer&page_size=integer&user_id=string&action=string&skill_id=string&start_time=string&end_time=string`
200: `{items:array<{id:string, user_id:string, action:string, skill_id:string, input_hash:string, output_summary:string, duration_ms:integer, status:string, created_at:string}>, total:integer, page:integer, page_size:integer}`

### GET /api/v1/audit/stats - 审计统计 | JWT(需admin)
Params: `?start_time=string&end_time=string&group_by=string="day"|"user"|"skill"`
200: `{stats:array<{key:string, count:integer, success_rate:number, avg_duration_ms:integer}>, total:integer}`

---

## 定时任务组

### POST /api/v1/schedules - 创建定时任务 | JWT
Body: `{message*:string, run_at?:string, recurring?:string="none", cron_expr?:string, chat_id?:string, description?:string}`
- 优先级: cron_expr > run_at > recurring
- cron_expr: 标准 5 段 cron（如 "0 9 * * 1-5" 工作日 9 点）
- recurring: none/daily/weekly/monthly（cron_expr 为空时使用）
- run_at: ISO8601 时间（一次性任务）
201: `{task_id:integer, status:string="pending"}`

### GET /api/v1/schedules - 查询定时任务列表 | JWT
Params: `?page=1&page_size=20`
200: `{items:array, total:integer, page:integer, page_size:integer}`

### GET /api/v1/schedules/{task_id} - 查询单个定时任务 | JWT
200: `{id:integer, message:string, cron_expr:string, next_run_at:string, status:string, retry_count:integer, ...}`
404: NOT_FOUND

### DELETE /api/v1/schedules/{task_id} - 取消定时任务 | JWT
200: `{task_id:integer, status:string="cancelled"}`
400: VALIDATION_ERROR

### GET /api/v1/schedules/dlq - 查询死信队列 | JWT
Params: `?page=1&page_size=20`
200: `{items:array, total:integer, page:integer, page_size:integer}`
注: 返回 retry_count >= max_retries 的 failed 任务，按 updated_at 倒序

### POST /api/v1/schedules/dlq/{task_id}/retry - 手动重试死信任务 | JWT
Body: `{}`
200: `{task_id:integer, status:string="pending"}`
404: NOT_FOUND
注: 重置 retry_count=0，状态回 pending，立即入队

### POST /api/v1/schedules/dlq/{task_id}/cancel - 放弃死信任务 | JWT
Body: `{}`
200: `{task_id:integer, status:string="cancelled"}`
404: NOT_FOUND

---

## 管理组

### GET /api/v1/users - 用户列表 | JWT(需admin)
Params: `?page=integer&page_size=integer&keyword=string&role=string`
200: `{items:array<{id:string, username:string, role:string, im_accounts:object, status:string, created_at:string}>, total:integer}`

### POST /api/v1/users - 创建用户 | JWT(需admin)
Body: `{username*:string, password*:string, role*:string="user"|"admin"|"manager", im_accounts?:object}`
200: `{id:string, username:string, role:string, created_at:string}`

### PUT /api/v1/users/{user_id} - 更新用户 | JWT(需admin)
Body: `{password?:string, role?:string, im_accounts?:object, status?:string}`
200: `{id:string, updated_at:string}`

### GET /api/v1/roles - 角色列表 | JWT
200: `{items:array<{id:string, name:string, permissions:array, description:string}>}`

### GET /api/v1/configs - 配置列表 | JWT(需admin)
Params: `?category=string`
200: `{items:array<{key:string, value:string, category:string, description:string, updatable:boolean}>}`

### PUT /api/v1/configs/{key} - 更新配置 | JWT(需admin)
Body: `{value*:string}`
200: `{key:string, value:string, updated_at:string}`

---

## 健康检查

### GET /health - 健康检查 | 无需认证
200: `{status:string="healthy", version:string, uptime:integer, components:object}`

### GET /ready - 就绪检查 | 无需认证
200: `{status:string="ready", dependencies:object}`
503: `{status:string="not_ready", dependencies:object}`

### GET /metrics - Prometheus 指标 | 无需认证
200: Prometheus text format — `/metrics` 端点暴露 HTTP/Agent/LLM/Skill/Workflow 5 组业务指标，详见上文「健康检查」章节。
